title: Restore missing admin link/button in navigation

requirements.text: Add a visible admin link/button to the site Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) so users can navigate to the /admin route from the app. The link should appear in the footer and/or the header navigation, consistent with the existing Cleanio brand design system (deep charcoal + electric orange). It should be present on all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: An 'Admin' link or button is visible in the Layout (header or footer) on every page of the app.
Clicking the Admin link navigates to the /admin route.
The link/button styling matches the existing Cleanio brand design (deep charcoal + electric orange palette).
The admin link is present on both desktop and mobile (hamburger menu) layouts.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx.
Do not change the admin authentication logic or ProtectedAdminRoute behavior.
The /admin route must remain protected behind ProtectedAdminRoute.
nonGoals: Changing the admin password or authentication mechanism.
Redesigning the admin bookings page itself.
Adding new backend endpoints or data models.
